topic: How to list a product on Facebook Marketplace

inputs.topic: How to list a product on Facebook Marketplace

lesson.teacherTitle: How to List on Facebook Marketplace
lesson.teacherObjective: After this lesson, you will be able to list a product on Facebook Marketplace, making it visible to buyers.
lesson.teacherExplanation:
Today we will learn how to use Facebook Marketplace to sell products locally. This tool allows you to reach potential buyers in your community for free.

Facebook Marketplace can be accessed through the Facebook app on your phone. It is widely used in KwaZulu-Natal, and businesses like Inkify use it to list services and products to reach more customers in a cost-effective way.

You will practice by listing a product on Facebook Marketplace during the task. This will show you how easy it is to start selling items without needing a physical shop.
teacherDiscussionQuestions: What kinds of products could you sell on Facebook Marketplace?
How can listing a product online benefit a small business?
What might be some challenges of selling products on Facebook?
lesson.teacherLocalExample: Inkify, run by Samke Jaca and Ntokozo Gwacela, uses Facebook Marketplace to offer printing services. This allows them to reach more customers without needing a physical store.
teacherTimeGuide: 5 min: write board points, students copy
10 min: students do task on phones
5 min: recap — what is one thing you learned?
lesson.taskTitle: How to List a Product on Facebook Marketplace
lesson.taskIntro: You will have your product listed on Facebook Marketplace where buyers can see it.
lesson.taskReflection: Describe a product you might want to sell on Facebook Marketplace. Why would local buyers be interested?

lesson.teacherPlanHTML:
Learning Objective

How to List on Facebook Marketplace

After this lesson, you will be able to list a product on Facebook Marketplace, making it visible to buyers.

✏ Write on the Board
Write these before class starts — students copy them down
  • Use Facebook app
  • Tap Marketplace icon
  • Create new listing
  • Choose item type
  • Publish listing

2Explain to Students

Read this aloud — then explain in your own words

Today we will learn how to use Facebook Marketplace to sell products locally. This tool allows you to reach potential buyers in your community for free.

Facebook Marketplace can be accessed through the Facebook app on your phone. It is widely used in KwaZulu-Natal, and businesses like Inkify use it to list services and products to reach more customers in a cost-effective way.

You will practice by listing a product on Facebook Marketplace during the task. This will show you how easy it is to start selling items without needing a physical shop.

3Discussion Questions

  1. 1What kinds of products could you sell on Facebook Marketplace?
  2. 2How can listing a product online benefit a small business?
  3. 3What might be some challenges of selling products on Facebook?

4Local Example

Inkify, run by Samke Jaca and Ntokozo Gwacela, uses Facebook Marketplace to offer printing services. This allows them to reach more customers without needing a physical store.
Time Guide — 30 minutes
5 minwrite board points, students copy
15 minteacher explains
10 minclass discussion
10 minstudents do task on phones
5 minrecap — what is one thing you learned?
